beginner.question:
console.log(0.1 + 0.2 === 0.3);
console.log(0 / 0);
beginner.answer:
console.log(Math.abs(0.1 + 0.2 - 0.3) < Number.EPSILON);
console.log(Number.isNaN(0 / 0));

beginner.answer:
